row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a city street with slight rightward drift or lane change.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: A white delivery truck is present on the left side in early frames and moves out of view; other vehicles maintain steady trajectories.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene with multi-lane road, brick buildings, sidewalks, and traffic infrastructure. A white USPS delivery truck is visible on the left initially.
semantic.visibility_notes: All objects are clearly defined with natural lighting and shadows. No occlusion issues affecting key elements.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward motion of ego vehicle. The delivery truck exits frame naturally as ego passes it. Pedestrians move at normal walking pace.
logical.object_continuity: Objects remain consistently visible until they exit frame due to perspective or occlusion. No sudden appearances or disappearances.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and signage remain stable and coherent throughout the sequence.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle proceeds forward steadily, maintaining lane position with minor adjustments.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected. Pedestrians are on sidewalk; no crossing behavior observed. Traffic flow appears calm.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street layout but with noticeable degradation in object clarity and texture fidelity. Buildings appear slightly warped or blurred.
key_objects: Bicycle (partially obscured or missing in some frames)
Distant cars (faint or merged with background)
semantic.visibility_notes: Reduced sharpness and detail compared to Row 1. Some objects blend into background or exhibit ghosting artifacts.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Forward motion preserved but exhibits slight jitter or warping in static structures. Object transitions less smooth than Row 1.
logical.object_continuity: Some objects flicker or partially vanish/reappear between frames. Delivery truck’s presence is intermittent or morphs unnaturally.
logical.structure_continuity: Building edges and road boundaries show minor instability or bending, especially near frame edges.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward, though trajectory may appear slightly unstable due to visual artifacts.
decision.risk_context: Scene readability reduced; potential for misinterpretation of pedestrian positions or lane boundaries. No explicit collision risk visible, but confidence in perception is lower.

missing_or_weakened_elements: Sharpness of crosswalk and lane markings
artifacts_or_instabilities: Blurring and loss of fine detail
Inconsistent rendering of textures and shadows
